title: Exchange Seats
input_format: Table: Seat with columns id (int, primary key, auto-increment), student (varchar)
output_format: Result table with swapped seat IDs — every two consecutive students swap seats. If odd number of students, the last one stays.
example_input:
Table: Seat
| id | student |
| 1  | Abbot   |
| 2  | Doris   |
| 3  | Emerson |
| 4  | Green   |
| 5  | Jeames  |
example_output:
| id | student |
| 1  | Doris   |
| 2  | Abbot   |
| 3  | Green   |
| 4  | Emerson |
| 5  | Jeames  |
constraints:
- 1 <= id <= 10^4
- id is continuous starting from 1
- student is a non-empty string
